approvalSource: Steve explicitly injected BUILD-LANE-FAILURE-TELEMETRY-001 as P0 after repeated proof/verifier/ship failures wasted time, and approved overnight Foundation process work with no live extraction, auth-required or paid runs, external writes, Drive permission mutation, Agent Feedback auto-send, or Harlan/Fal/voice/Canva/OpenHuman feature work.
scopeSummary: Create local Foundation build-lane failure telemetry that fingerprints failed checks, counts repeats over 24h/7d, surfaces repeated failures in System Health, and routes red repeats toward repair without weakening any verifier.
constraints: No transcript fetch, screenshot capture, crawl, summarization, or model call.
Do not weaken, skip, bypass, or demote verifier failures.
